calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, August 12, 2015, in Department 525:
SF Tax Collector-Invesigations Unit, Respondent/Plaintiff appears by Charles Smith/investigator.
Belete Fantaw Shibeshi, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Mr. Smith testifies on behalf of SF Tax Collector and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Not Marked - various exhibits: SFMTA citation, notice of violation & administrative fine, 7/16/2015 e-mails, and transportation/utilities law codes.

Defendant/Appellant, Belete Fantaw Shibeshi testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence from Mr. Smith retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Judgment Entered
